/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/colors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/prompt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/builtins.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.out.dir/process.cpp.o -o shell.out  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libreadline.tbd
